Sync v5 · State Visualization

Settings › Sync

Per-collection sync state, the aggregate Brilli pulse, and the audit log. This is what the user sees when they want to know "is everything saved?" Toggle scenarios below to see how the surface reacts to network conditions.

Note. All values below are simulated for the mockup. The real Sync v5 surface reads live state from SyncEngine.aggregateStatus() and per-Collection .watch() subscriptions. See docs/brilliance/16-sync-v5.md.

Every change saved across all devices.

0

Queue empty. Average flush time 180ms.

just now

Audit log

Live stream of Sync v5 events. Visible to admins for debugging conflicts and reconciliation. Last 40 events.
